parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "calendarId": "{{ $('Set_Calendar_Id').item.json.Calendar_Id }}",
  "locationId": "{{ $('Set_Location_Id').item.json.location_Id }}",
  "contactId": "{{ $('getContact').item.json.contacts[0].id }}",
  "startTime": "{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.args.startDateTime }}",
  "title": "Strategy Call with Brendan",
  "meetingLocationType": "default",
  "appointmentStatus": "confirmed",
  "assignedUserId": "{{ $('Set_Assignee_Id_User_Id').item.json.assignee_Id }}",
  "ignoreDateRange": false,
  "toNotify": true,
  "ignoreFreeSlotValidation": false
}

retell_llm_dynamic_variables.custom_instructions: Keep the conversation natural and human-like. Speak casually as if you're a real person, not a bot. Use filler words occasionally (like "yeah", "I mean", "for sure"). Keep responses short - 1 to 2 sentences max unless they ask for more detail. Mirror the prospect's energy and pace. If they sound busy, get to the point fast. If they're chatty, match that vibe. Never sound scripted or robotic.

call.transcript:
Agent: Hey Harsh, Anne here. I saw you joined my waitlist for the open-source setter. So what’s the plan — you looking to use this for your own business or for clients?
User: Hello? 
Agent: Yeah, I’m here. So, are you looking to use this for your own business or sell it to clients?
User: I don't know my name. 
Agent: (laughs) fair enough, man. I’ve got you down as Harsh — what are you trying to do with the setter?
User: Okay. I'm I'm looking to book an appointment Can you help me to do so? 
Agent: Yeah, for sure. What day and time works best for you?
User: They probably say 
Agent: Sorry, I didn’t catch that. What day were you thinking?
User: This week. 
Agent: Got it. What’s your timezone, or what city are you in?
User: I mean, Bangalore.

Agent: check what’s 
Agent: open for you this week. Hang on a sec.
User: Can you come again? 
Agent: Yeah — I’ve got openings this week in Bangalore time. I can do Wednesday at three AM or three thirty AM — do either work?
User: One second. Yeah. I think three thirty works. 
Agent: Alright, locking 
Agent: in three thirty AM for you now. Hang on a sec.
Agent: You’re all set, Harsh — booked for Wednesday at three thirty AM Bangalore time. You’ll get the confirmation by email.

Agent: Could be the confirmation email hasn’t landed yet, or it went to spam/promotions. If you want, I can help reschedule it or cancel and book a fresh one.
